hvac.stat: 31% more booked service calls in month one.
hvac.story: An HVAC contractor in a similar market automated their review responses, seasonal maintenance reminders, and post-job follow-up. First 30 days: 31% increase in booked calls. Owner reclaimed 6+ hours per week previously spent on manual follow-up.

plumbing.story: A plumbing shop added AI-powered 24/7 scheduling and automated quote follow-up. Within a month: 22% more booked jobs, zero missed after-hours leads, and quote response time dropped from 2 days to under 2 hours.

electrical.stat: 18% lift in repeat business from past customers.
electrical.story: An electrical contractor implemented automated post-job follow-up and a customer reactivation sequence for their 3-year dormant customer list. Result: 18% of past customers rebooked within 60 days — with no ad spend.

landscaping.story: A landscaping company built an AI reminder and rebooking system for seasonal transitions. 40% of prior-year customers re-signed before the season started — without a single manual outreach call.

cleaning.story: A commercial cleaning company automated their intake and quoting workflow. Quote turnaround went from 3 days to same-day. Win rate on competitive bids improved significantly — they were simply faster than every competitor.

construction.story: A general contractor automated subcontractor coordination, schedule check-ins, and permit tracking. Project manager follow-up overhead dropped by 80%. Two fewer admin hours per project per week, across an 8-project pipeline.

other.stat: Measurable ROI in the first 30 days.
other.story: Every Fieldwork AI engagement starts with identifying your highest-leverage automation opportunity — the one that pays for itself fastest. We've consistently found it in the first three days.
